ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workclass associated with the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID representing marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the relationship to the household */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the country of residence */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income bracket (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the individual works in */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of work experience */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_capital_gain FOREIGN KEY ("capital_gain") REFERENCES capital_gains ("gain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_capital_loss FOREIGN KEY ("capital_loss") REFERENCES capital_losses ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_hours_per_week FOREIGN KEY ("hours_per_week") REFERENCES hours_worked ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the workclass is government-related */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status involves being married */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "is_skilled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the occupation is skilled */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the occupation is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "is_head_of_household" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is the head of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the bracket */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gains" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital gain entry */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of capital gain */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the capital gain was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the capital gain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital loss entry */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of capital loss */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the capital loss was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the capital loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_worked" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hours worked entry */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the hours were worked */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
